keyFactors: you want to hire someone with the most experience making an effort / taking initiative even if they don't have a 100 percent success rate. failure is a necessary part of growing and sharpening your skills.
strategy: basically i hired people based on their ratio of success to failure. as long as their success significantly outweighed their failures i voted for them.
